name: TMA contracts and presentation helpers
description: TMA `BudgetDTO` and `BudgetStatusDTO` carry `scope: 'household' | 'personal'` and `ownerUserId: string | null`. `useBudgetListQuery({ scope?, period?, householdId? })` defaults to `scope: 'all'` and is callable with no required args. New `getBudgetScopeLabel` and `getBudgetScopeTone` presentation helpers. `getLatestBudget` is verified across mixed scopes.

planned: Extend `apps/tma/src/test/budget-presentation.test.ts` with scope label/tone cases and a multi-scope `getLatestBudget` case.
TMA typecheck and focused vitest pass.
